name: Epithelial-Mesenchymal Transition
description: Epithelial-mesenchymal transition: TGF-beta/Wnt signals induce Snail/Zeb/Twist factors that repress E-cadherin, dissolve junctions and polarity, and confer a migratory mesenchymal phenotype that can revert via MET.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["TGF-b / Wnt signal"]
    N2["Receptor signaling (SMAD)"]
    N3["EMT-TFs: Snail/Zeb/Twist"]
    N4["Repress E-cadherin (CDH1)"]
    N5["Loss of cell-cell junctions"]
    N6["Cytoskeletal remodeling"]
    N7["Gain N-cadherin/vimentin"]
    N8["Apical-basal polarity lost"]
    N9["Migratory/invasive cell"]
    N10{"Revert via MET?"}
    N11["Epithelial state restored"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 --> N3
    N3 --> N4
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 -->|MET| N11
    N10 -->|persist| N9

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
